aliases: Cartel del Norte del Valle del Cauca
description: Colombian drug trafficking organization based in northern Valle del Cauca, active from the 1980s to 2008. It emerged after the fragmentation of the Cali Cartel in the mid-1990s and was known for its violence and internal betrayals. The cartel was led by Orlando Henao Montoya until his death in 1998, after which it split into factions led by Diego Montoya Sánchez and Wilber Alirio Varela. It was eventually dismantled, though small dissident groups remain active.

country_links.evidence_quote: Juan Carlos Ramírez Abadía fue detenido en el Gran São Paulo... El Piloto contratado por el traficante para el pleno conocimiento de la legislación aeronáutica brasileña
country_links.context: The cartel operated in Brazil, as a pilot contracted by the cartel was arrested there and the cartel used Brazilian aeronautical legislation knowledge.

country_links.evidence_quote: de Colombia a México y en última instancia a los Estados Unidos
country_links.context: The cartel exported cocaine through Mexico en route to the United States.

country_links.evidence_quote: el cartel de Norte del Valle exportó más de 1,2 millones de libras de cocaína ... de Colombia a México y en última instancia a los Estados Unidos para la reventa
country_links.context: The cartel exported cocaine to the United States for resale.

country_links.evidence_quote: el posterior asesinato de Wilber Alirio Varela en 2008 en Venezuela
country_links.context: The cartel's leader Wilber Alirio Varela was assassinated in Venezuela.
